records.jp: タイトルを設定してください
records.en_novel: Title
records.en_asset: Title
records.vi: Hãy Đặt Tiêu Đề

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
あのまま訓練所に居座ってると迷惑だから、
出てきたはいいものの……
records.en_novel:
Sticking around the training grounds would've been a nuisance,
so we left, but...
records.en_asset:
Sticking around the training grounds would've been a nuisance，
so we left，but...
records.vi:
Cứ ở lì trong khu huấn luyện thì sẽ làm phiền người ta nên
bọn anh ra ngoài rồi…

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp: うぅぅ～……これ、どうしたらいいのでしょう……にゃん♡
records.en_novel: Uuu~... what am I supposed to do about this... nya♡
records.en_asset: Uuu~... what am I supposed to do about this... nya♡
records.vi: Ưưư~… chuyện này phải làm sao đây… nya♡

records.speaker: 少女
records.jp:
おかーさん！　『にゃん！』だって～！
猫さん好きなのかな～？
records.en_novel:
Mommy! She said 'nya'~!
Does she like kitties~?
records.en_asset:
Mommy! She said 'nya'~!
Does she like kitties~?
records.vi:
Mẹ ơi! Chị ấy nói “nya” kìa~!
Chị ấy thích mèo sao ạ~?

records.speaker: 母親
records.jp:
しっ、見ちゃいけません。
そういう年頃なのっ。
records.en_novel:
Shh, don't stare.
She's at that age.
records.en_asset:
Shh，don't stare.
She's at that age.
records.vi:
Suỵt‚ đừng nhìn.
Con bé đang ở cái tuổi đó đấy.

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
あぁっ、また可哀想なオートマタを見るような目をされたにゃん！
穴があったら入りたいにゃん！　もういやですにゃ～～ん！
records.en_novel:
Ahh, they looked at me with pity again, nya!
I want to crawl into a hole, nya! I can't take this anymore, nya~~n!
records.en_asset:
Ahh，they looked at me with pity again，nya!
I want to crawl into a hole，nya! I can't take this anymore，nya~~n!
records.vi:
A á‚ mình lại bị nhìn bằng ánh mắt thương hại như nhìn automata tội nghiệp nữa rồi nya!
Ước gì có cái hố để chui xuống nya! Mình chịu hết nổi rồi nya~~n!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
可哀想なオートマタってなんなのぉ？
まあ、ちょっと胸の痛い光景だったけどぉ～。
records.en_novel:
What's a 'pitiful automaton' supposed to mean?
Well, it was a bit painful to watch though~.
records.en_asset:
What's a 'pitiful automaton' supposed to mean?
Well，it was a bit painful to watch though~.
records.vi:
Automata tội nghiệp là sao vậy trời?
Ừ thì cảnh đó nhìn cũng hơi nhói lòng thật đó~.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
アーデルハイトさんの見立てでは、このにゃんにゃん症は
時間が経てばそのうち治るということでしたが……
records.en_novel:
According to Adelheid-san, this nya-nya syndrome
should resolve on its own with time, but...
records.en_asset:
According to Adelheid-san，this nya-nya syndrome
should resolve on its own with time，but...
records.vi:
Theo chẩn đoán của Adelheid-san thì chứng nya-nya này
để thêm một thời gian sẽ tự khỏi nhưng…

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
そのうちって、いつですかにゃん！？　恥ずかしいにゃんっ！
なんとかしたいにゃぁ～～ん！
records.en_novel:
When is 'on its own', nya!? This is embarrassing, nya!
I want to fix this, nya~~n!
records.en_asset:
When is 'on its own'，nya!? This is embarrassing，nya!
I want to fix this，nya~~n!
records.vi:
Một thời gian là bao giờ vậy nya!? Xấu hổ chết đi được nya!
Em muốn làm gì đó để chữa ngay nya~~n!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
わたしは、かわいくていいと思いますけど……。
ウェンディさんが嫌がっている以上、放置はできませんね……よし。
records.en_novel:
I think it's cute and all, but...
If Wendy-san doesn't like it, we can't just leave it be... Okay.
records.en_asset:
I think it's cute and all，but...
If Wendy-san doesn't like it，we can't just leave it be... Okay.
records.vi:
Em thì thấy dễ thương cũng tốt mà…
Nhưng Wendy-san đã không thích thì không thể bỏ mặc được… được rồi.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp: ――ウェンディさん、元気を出してほしいにゃんっ。
records.en_novel: ——Wendy-san, I want you to cheer up, nya!
records.en_asset: ——Wendy-san，I want you to cheer up，nya!
records.vi: ――Wendy-san‚ hãy phấn chấn lên nya!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp: へ……？　ヴィーラさん……？
records.en_novel: Huh...? Viera-san...?
records.en_asset: Huh...? Viera-san...?
records.vi: Hể…? Viera-san…?

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
これこそ、ヒマリさんから聞いた日本の伝統的な風習――
その名も『赤信号、みんなで渡れば怖くない』ルールです。
records.en_novel:
This is a traditional Japanese custom I heard about from
Himari-san—— the 'red light, not scary if everyone crosses together' rule.
records.en_asset:
This is a traditional Japanese custom I heard about from
Himari-san—— the 'red light，not scary if everyone crosses together' rule.
records.vi:
Đây chính là phong tục truyền thống Nhật Bản mà em nghe từ
Himari-san―― luật “đèn đỏ mà cả đám cùng băng qua thì chẳng còn đáng sợ”.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
そう、みんなでネコ語を喋れば、ウェンディさんも恥ずかしくないんです。
というわけで……さあ、お姉ちゃんも一緒に。
records.en_novel:
That's right——if we all speak cat, Wendy-san won't be embarrassed.
So with that in mind... come on, Onee-chan, join in.
records.en_asset:
That's right——if we all speak cat，Wendy-san won't be embarrassed.
So with that in mind... come on，Onee-chan，join in.
records.vi:
Đúng vậy――nếu mọi người cùng nói tiếng mèo thì Wendy-san sẽ không thấy xấu hổ nữa.
Vậy nên… nào‚ chị cũng nói cùng đi.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp: はぁ～っ？　なんであたしがぁ！？
records.en_novel: Huhh~? Why do I have to!?
records.en_asset: Huhh~? Why do I have to!?
records.vi: Hảả~? Sao lại là chị chứ!?

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
お姉ちゃんのネコ語、絶対すっごくかわいいし……じゃなくって。
ウェンディさんのために、お願いっ。
records.en_novel:
Onee-chan speaking cat would be super cute... I mean, that's not the
point. Please, do it for Wendy-san.
records.en_asset:
Onee-chan speaking cat would be super cute... I mean，that's not the
point. Please，do it for Wendy-san.
records.vi:
Tiếng mèo của chị chắc chắn sẽ siêu dễ thương… à không phải.
Vì Wendy-san mà‚ em xin chị đó.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp: ヴィーラが聞きたいだけでしょ～！
records.en_novel: You just want to hear it for yourself~!
records.en_asset: You just want to hear it for yourself~!
records.vi: Viera chỉ muốn tự mình nghe thôi chứ gì~!

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp: ……仕方ない。俺がなんとかしてやろう。
records.en_novel: ...Fine. I'll figure something out.
records.en_asset: ...Fine. I'll figure something out.
records.vi: …Hết cách rồi. Để anh nghĩ cách vậy.

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp: 司令官……？　何か、いい考えがあるにゃ……？
records.en_novel: Commander...? Do you have a good idea, nya...?
records.en_asset: Commander...? Do you have a good idea，nya...?
records.vi: Chỉ Huy…? Anh có ý hay gì sao nya…?

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
もしかして、司令官さまも一緒にネコ語を？
それはそれで――いいですね。アリだと思います。
records.en_novel:
Could it be... Commander-sama is going to speak cat too?
That would be——nice, actually. I think that works.
records.en_asset:
Could it be... Commander-sama is going to speak cat too?
That would be——nice，actually. I think that works.
records.vi:
Chẳng lẽ Chỉ Huy-sama cũng sẽ nói tiếng mèo cùng sao?
Nếu vậy thì――hay đấy. Em thấy cũng được.

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
やらないし、よくないし、アリでもない！
ウェンディやヴィーラと違って、俺が言ったら何かしらの法に触れる！
records.en_novel:
I'm not doing it, it's not nice, and it doesn't work! Unlike Wendy and
Viera, if I said it there'd be some kind of law broken!
records.en_asset:
I'm not doing it，it's not nice，and it doesn't work! Unlike Wendy and
Viera，if I said it there'd be some kind of law broken!
records.vi:
Anh không làm‚ không hay‚ cũng chẳng được gì hết!
Khác với Wendy và Viera‚ anh mà nói vậy là đụng tới luật nào đó ngay!

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
いいか、俺が思うにだな。
今の状態をやり過ごすなら――あそこが１番のはずだ。
records.en_novel:
Listen, the way I see it,
if we want to ride this out——that place is our best bet.
records.en_asset:
Listen，the way I see it，
if we want to ride this out——that place is our best bet.
records.vi:
Nghe này‚ theo anh nghĩ thì.
Nếu muốn vượt qua tình trạng hiện tại――chỗ đó hẳn là lựa chọn tốt nhất.

records.jp:
――兵士たちの武具の作製やメンテナンスを請け負う工房。
常に金属を打つ音に包まれているこの場所に、普段以上の喧騒が響いていた。
records.en_novel:
——The workshop where soldiers' gear is crafted and maintained.
Always filled with hammering, the place was even noisier than usual today.
records.en_asset:
——The workshop where soldiers' gear is crafted and maintained.
Always filled with hammering，the place was even noisier than usual today.
records.vi:
――Xưởng đảm nhận chế tạo và bảo trì vũ khí phòng cụ cho binh lính.
Nơi vốn luôn vang tiếng kim loại va đập hôm nay còn ồn ào hơn thường lệ.

records.speaker: ホノカ
records.jp:
武器を作る時は、そりゃ～～！　からのゴンゴンカーン！
で、ゴゴォ～～～って、熱い火にくべてまたドドーン！　だぞ！
records.en_novel:
When you make a weapon, you go hyaaa~~! Then GONK GONK CLANG!
And then GWOOO~~~ you shove it in the hot fire and then KABOOM! Got it!?
records.en_asset:
When you make a weapon，you go hyaaa~~! Then GONK GONK CLANG!
And then GWOOO~~~ you shove it in the hot fire and then KABOOM! Got it!?
records.vi:
Khi rèn vũ khí thì phải hây daaa~~! Rồi GONG GONG KENG!
Sau đó GÙÙÙ~~~ bỏ vào lửa nóng rồi lại ĐÙNG ĐÙNG! Hiểu chưa!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp: そんな教え方じゃ、わかんないってぇ～～！
records.en_novel: Nobody can learn from instructions like that~~!
records.en_asset: Nobody can learn from instructions like that~~!
records.vi: Dạy kiểu đó thì ai mà hiểu được chứ~~!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
ううぅ……暑いぃ……。
お姉ちゃん、わたし、溶けちゃうかもぉ……
records.en_novel:
Uuu... it's so hot...
Onee-chan, I think I might melt...
records.en_asset:
Uuu... it's so hot...
Onee-chan，I think I might melt...
records.vi:
Ưưư… nóng quá…
Chị ơi‚ em có khi tan chảy mất thôi…

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
諦めちゃだめよ、ヴィーラ！　ここが勝負の分岐点なんだからぁ！
ほら、ウェンディも頑張ってるでしょ～！
records.en_novel:
Don't give up, Viera! This is the turning point!
Look, Wendy's doing her best too~!
records.en_asset:
Don't give up，Viera! This is the turning point!
Look，Wendy's doing her best too~!
records.vi:
Không được bỏ cuộc đâu Viera! Đây là bước ngoặt quyết định đó!
Nhìn đi‚ Wendy cũng đang cố hết sức mà~!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
気合いをこめて～～……打つにゃ！
にゃん！　にゃん！　にゃ～～～ん！
records.en_novel:
Put your heart into it~~... and strike, nya!
Nya! Nya! Nya~~~n!
records.en_asset:
Put your heart into it~~... and strike，nya!
Nya! Nya! Nya~~~n!
records.vi:
Dồn hết tinh thần vào~~… rồi đập nya!
Nyan! Nyan! Nya~~~n!

records.speaker: ホノカ
records.jp:
おおっ！　おまえ、いいかんじだな！
ちょっとやけくそっぽいけど、きあいばっちり、花丸だぞ！
records.en_novel:
Ooh! You've got the knack!
It's a bit desperate-looking, but the spirit is spot on! Gold star!
records.en_asset:
Ooh! You've got the knack!
It's a bit desperate-looking，but the spirit is spot on! Gold star!
records.vi:
Ồồ! Cô làm được đấy!
Nhìn hơi liều mạng một chút nhưng khí thế thì khỏi chê. Cho hoa điểm mười luôn!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp: そ、そうですかにゃ？　えへへ～♪
records.en_novel: R-really, nya? Ehehe~♪
records.en_asset: R-really，nya? Ehehe~♪
records.vi: Th-thật vậy sao nya? Ehehe~♪

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
……鍛冶場は金属音がうるさいから、ネコ語を気にしなくていい、って……。
理屈は分かるけどぉ……だったら他のことでもよくな～い……？
records.en_novel:
...The forge is so loud that nobody will notice the cat talk...
I get the logic, but... couldn't we have done something else~...?
records.en_asset:
...The forge is so loud that nobody will notice the cat talk...
I get the logic，but... couldn't we have done something else~...?
records.vi:
…Vì lò rèn ồn tiếng kim loại nên khỏi để ý tiếng mèo…
Lý thì chị hiểu đó… nhưng nếu vậy làm chuyện khác cũng được mà nhỉ~…?

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp: どうした、ベリサ。手が止まってるぞ？
records.en_novel: What's wrong, Verisa? Your hands stopped.
records.en_asset: What's wrong，Verisa? Your hands stopped.
records.vi: Sao thế Verisa. Tay em dừng rồi kìa?

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
おにーさんはなんで高みの見物なのよ～！
一緒にやってよぉ！
records.en_novel:
Why are you just watching from the sidelines, Onii-san~!
Get in here and work too!
records.en_asset:
Why are you just watching from the sidelines，Onii-san~!
Get in here and work too!
records.vi:
Sao anh lại đứng ngoài xem như vậy chứ~!
Vào làm cùng đi mà!

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
俺は監督役だからな。それより折角、鍛冶を体験させてもらってるんだ。
ウェンディを見習って、もっと本気でやれ。
records.en_novel:
I'm the supervisor. Besides, you're getting to experience smithing
firsthand. Follow Wendy's example and put some real effort in.
records.en_asset:
I'm the supervisor. Besides，you're getting to experience smithing
firsthand. Follow Wendy's example and put some real effort in.
records.vi:
Anh là người giám sát mà. Với lại hiếm khi được trải nghiệm rèn đồ thế này.
Học theo Wendy rồi nghiêm túc hơn đi.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp: ああもぉ～～！　ウェンディのためだもの、わかったわよ～！
records.en_novel: Ugh, fine~~! It's for Wendy's sake, so I get it~!
records.en_asset: Ugh，fine~~! It's for Wendy's sake，so I get it~!
records.vi: Aaa thật là~~! Vì Wendy nên chị hiểu rồi~!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
うん、わたしももっと強く叩いて、大きな音を鳴らさなきゃ。
ウェンディさんの声をかき消すぐらいに……！
records.en_novel:
Right, I need to hit harder and make even bigger sounds too.
Loud enough to drown out Wendy-san's voice...!
records.en_asset:
Right，I need to hit harder and make even bigger sounds too.
Loud enough to drown out Wendy-san's voice...!
records.vi:
Ừ‚ mình cũng phải đập mạnh hơn để tạo tiếng thật lớn.
Lớn đến mức át cả giọng Wendy-san…!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
こんな灼熱の工房で、ふたりがこんなにがんばって……！
わたしも、もっともっと全力でいくのにゃっ！
records.en_novel:
Both of them working so hard in this scorching workshop...!
I've gotta go even harder, nya!
records.en_asset:
Both of them working so hard in this scorching workshop...!
I've gotta go even harder，nya!
records.vi:
Hai người cố gắng đến vậy trong xưởng nóng như thiêu thế này…!
Mình cũng phải dốc sức hơn nữa nya!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp: にゃっ！　にゃんっ！　にゃうぅ～～～……にゃぁ～～～ん！
records.en_novel: Nya! Nyan! Nyauu~~~... nyaa~~~n!
records.en_asset: Nya! Nyan! Nyauu~~~... nyaa~~~n!
records.vi: Nya! Nyan! Nyauu~~~… nyaa~~~n!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp: （ウェンディ、あんなに必死に……！）
records.en_novel: (Wendy, she's trying so hard...!)
records.en_asset: (Wendy，she's trying so hard...!)
records.vi: (Wendy đang liều mạng đến vậy…!)

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
（自分のためじゃない。
わたしたちの頑張りが無駄にならないようにって、全力で……）
records.en_novel:
(It's not for herself.
She's giving everything she's got so our efforts won't be wasted...)
records.en_asset:
(It's not for herself.
She's giving everything she's got so our efforts won't be wasted...)
records.vi:
(Không phải vì bản thân cậu ấy.
Cậu ấy đang dốc hết sức để cố gắng của chúng ta không thành vô ích…)

records.speaker: ベリサ・ヴィーラ
records.jp:
（あんないい子に、これ以上苦しい思いをさせちゃいけない！
何があっても、絶対に助ける……！　どんな症状でも、どーんと来い！）
records.en_novel:
(We can't let such a good girl suffer any more than this!
No matter what, we'll save her...! Whatever the symptom, bring it on!)
records.en_asset:
(We can't let such a good girl suffer any more than this!
No matter what，we'll save her...! Whatever the symptom，bring it on!)
records.vi:
(Không thể để một cô bé tốt như vậy chịu khổ thêm nữa!
Dù có chuyện gì cũng nhất định phải cứu cậu ấy…! Triệu chứng nào cũng cứ tới đây!)

records.jp:
――酒場。大穴探索に挑む者たちの憩いの場。
その一室にある個室風呂にて……
records.en_novel:
——The tavern. A place of rest for those who brave the Abyss.
In a private bath within one of its rooms...
records.en_asset:
——The tavern. A place of rest for those who brave the Abyss.
In a private bath within one of its rooms...
records.vi:
――Quán rượu. Nơi nghỉ chân của những người thách thức Đại Hố.
Tại phòng tắm riêng trong một căn phòng ở đó…

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
冷気よ！　煮えたぎるお湯を冷ませ！
はぁぁぁぁ――！
records.en_novel:
Ice, heed my call! Cool this boiling water!
Haaaaaah——!
records.en_asset:
Ice，heed my call! Cool this boiling water!
Haaaaaah——!
records.vi:
Hỡi khí lạnh! Hãy làm nguội làn nước đang sôi sục này!
Haaaaa――!

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
おー、いい湯加減だ。いいぞ、ヴィーラ。
ウェンディの熱に負けずにがんばれ。
records.en_novel:
Ohh, the water's just right. Nice work, Viera.
Keep at it——don't let Wendy's heat win.
records.en_asset:
Ohh，the water's just right. Nice work，Viera.
Keep at it——don't let Wendy's heat win.
records.vi:
Ồ‚ nhiệt độ nước vừa đẹp đấy. Tốt lắm Viera.
Cố lên‚ đừng thua sức nóng của Wendy.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp: はいっ！
records.en_novel: Yes, sir!
records.en_asset: Yes，sir!
records.vi: Vâng ạ!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
ふしゅぅぅぅぅ～～～……。
申しわけないです、ヴィーラさん……
records.en_novel:
Fshuuuuu~~~...
I'm so sorry, Viera-san...
records.en_asset:
Fshuuuuu~~~...
I'm so sorry，Viera-san...
records.vi:
Phù xìiiii~~~…
Em xin lỗi Viera-san…

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
今度の症状は発熱か～。ヴィーラが凍らせようとしてるのに
浴槽がお湯のままって……ウェンディってば、どんだけ熱いのよぉ～。
records.en_novel:
So the symptom this time is fever, huh~. Viera's trying to freeze it,
but the tub's still hot... how much heat are you putting out, Wendy~.
records.en_asset:
So the symptom this time is fever，huh~. Viera's trying to freeze it，
but the tub's still hot... how much heat are you putting out，Wendy~.
records.vi:
Triệu chứng lần này là sốt à~. Viera đang cố đóng băng nó
mà bồn vẫn là nước nóng… Wendy nóng tới mức nào vậy trời~.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
……ていうかぁ～。
な～んでおにーさんまでウェンディと一緒に湯船に入ってるの～？
records.en_novel:
...Also~.
Why~ is Onii-san in the tub together with Wendy~?
records.en_asset:
...Also~.
Why~ is Onii-san in the tub together with Wendy~?
records.vi:
…Mà nói mới nhớ~.
Sao cả anh cũng vào bồn tắm chung với Wendy vậy~?

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
せっかく湯が沸いてるなら、ひとっ風呂浴びようと思ってな。
おかげでボイラー代が浮いたぜ。
records.en_novel:
Well, the water's already heated, so I figured I'd take a quick soak.
Saved us on the boiler costs, too.
records.en_asset:
Well，the water's already heated，so I figured I'd take a quick soak.
Saved us on the boiler costs，too.
records.vi:
Đằng nào nước cũng nóng sẵn nên anh nghĩ tranh thủ tắm một chút.
Nhờ vậy tiết kiệm được tiền lò hơi nữa.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
こんなところで節約すんな～～。
司令官だっていうのに、財布の中身までざこざこなのぉ～？
records.en_novel:
Don't penny-pinch here of all places~~.
You're the Commander and even your wallet is helpless~?
records.en_asset:
Don't penny-pinch here of all places~~.
You're the Commander and even your wallet is helpless~?
records.vi:
Đừng có tiết kiệm ở chỗ này chứ~~.
Là Chỉ Huy mà ví tiền của anh cũng yếu xìu vậy sao~?

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
俺の財布は関係ないだろーが！
基地の予算を節約する有能司令官なんだよ！
records.en_novel:
My wallet has nothing to do with it!
I'm a capable commander who saves on the base's budget!
records.en_asset:
My wallet has nothing to do with it!
I'm a capable commander who saves on the base's budget!
records.vi:
Ví của anh thì liên quan gì chứ!
Anh là Chỉ Huy tài giỏi biết tiết kiệm ngân sách căn cứ đấy!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
わ、わわわ……司令官がわたしと一緒のお風呂に……！
どうしよう……頭がもっとぽわぽわするぅ……！
records.en_novel:
W-wawawa... the Commander is in the same bath as me...!
What do I do... my head's getting even more fuzzy...!
records.en_asset:
W-wawawa... the Commander is in the same bath as me...!
What do I do... my head's getting even more fuzzy...!
records.vi:
W-wa wa wa… Chỉ Huy đang tắm chung với em…!
Phải làm sao đây… đầu em càng lâng lâng hơn rồi…!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
……？　なんだか温度が高くなってる？
ずっと魔法を使い続けて、出力が落ちてるのかな……？
records.en_novel:
...? The temperature seems to be rising?
Maybe my output is dropping from using magic continuously...?
records.en_asset:
...? The temperature seems to be rising?
Maybe my output is dropping from using magic continuously...?
records.vi:
…? Hình như nhiệt độ đang tăng lên?
Có lẽ mình dùng phép liên tục nên công suất giảm rồi chăng…?

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
ねえお姉ちゃん。わたしちょっとだけ疲れちゃったのかも。
もし良かったら、がんばれって励まして欲しいな～、なんて……
records.en_novel:
Hey, Onee-chan. I think I might be getting a little tired.
If you don't mind, could you cheer me on... maybe...?
records.en_asset:
Hey，Onee-chan. I think I might be getting a little tired.
If you don't mind，could you cheer me on... maybe...?
records.vi:
Này chị ơi. Có lẽ em hơi mệt một chút rồi.
Nếu được thì chị cổ vũ em cố lên được không… chẳng hạn vậy…

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
もー、仕方ないわね～～！
フレー、フレー、ヴィーラ！　がんばれ、がんばれ、ヴィーラ～～～！
records.en_novel:
Jeez, can't be helped~~!
Go go, Viera! You can do it, you can do it, Viera~~~!
records.en_asset:
Jeez，can't be helped~~!
Go go，Viera! You can do it，you can do it，Viera~~~!
records.vi:
Thật là‚ hết cách rồi~~!
Cố lên‚ cố lên Viera! Cố lên‚ cố lên Viera~~~!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
わぁ……お姉ちゃんがわたしを応援してくれてる……！
もっと頑張らないと！　はぁぁぁぁぁぁ……！！
records.en_novel:
Wow... Onee-chan is cheering for me...!
I have to try even harder! Haaaaaaah...!!
records.en_asset:
Wow... Onee-chan is cheering for me...!
I have to try even harder! Haaaaaaah...!!
records.vi:
Wa… chị đang cổ vũ cho em…!
Em phải cố hơn nữa! Haaaaaaaa…!!

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
ちょっ……やり過ぎ……！
凍る！　俺ごと凍る……っ！！！
records.en_novel:
W-wait... too much...!
It's freezing! I'm freezing along with it...!!!
records.en_asset:
W-wait... too much...!
It's freezing! I'm freezing along with it...!!!
records.vi:
Khoan… quá tay rồi…!
Đóng băng mất! Anh cũng bị đóng băng theo mất…!!!

records.jp:
兵士たちの食事を用意するためのキッチン。
そこでは、包丁を手にしたウェンディがすさまじい速度で食材を捌いていた。
records.en_novel:
The kitchen where meals are prepared for the soldiers. There, Wendy
stood with knife in hand, slicing through ingredients at terrifying speed.
records.en_asset:
The kitchen where meals are prepared for the soldiers. There，Wendy
stood with knife in hand，slicing through ingredients at terrifying speed.
records.vi:
Nhà bếp chuẩn bị bữa ăn cho binh lính.
Ở đó‚ Wendy cầm dao và xử lý nguyên liệu với tốc độ khủng khiếp.

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
ううう、お腹が減ってお腹が減って……！
とても我慢できませんっ！　それそれそれ～～～！
records.en_novel:
Uuuu, I'm so hungry, so incredibly hungry...!
I can't take it anymore! Here here here~~~!
records.en_asset:
Uuuu，I'm so hungry，so incredibly hungry...!
I can't take it anymore! Here here here~~~!
records.vi:
Ưưư‚ đói quá đói quá…!
Em không nhịn nổi nữa! Nào nào nào~~~!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
これが空腹の症状……！　どんどん食材が切り分けられてます！
ああ、下味まで完璧にこなしてお姉ちゃんのところへ……！
records.en_novel:
So this is the hunger symptom...! Ingredients cut up one after
another! She's even seasoning them before sending them to Onee-chan...!
records.en_asset:
So this is the hunger symptom...! Ingredients cut up one after
another! She's even seasoning them before sending them to Onee-chan...!
records.vi:
Đây là triệu chứng đói bụng…! Nguyên liệu đang bị cắt ra liên tục!
Aa‚ cậu ấy còn ướp gia vị hoàn hảo rồi chuyển sang chỗ chị nữa…!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
炎よ！　水に棲みしもの、野に息づくもの、大地に根づきしもの、
すべてを遍く、こんがりと焼き上げなさ～～い！
records.en_novel:
O flame! Creatures of the water, beasts of the field, roots of the
earth—— cook every last one of them to a golden crisp~~!
records.en_asset:
O flame! Creatures of the water，beasts of the field，roots of the
earth—— cook every last one of them to a golden crisp~~!
records.vi:
Hỡi lửa! Những loài sống dưới nước‚ những sinh vật thở nơi đồng nội‚ những gì cắm rễ trong đất‚
hãy nướng tất cả cho vàng thơm đi~~!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp: わぁ～～～！　とっても美味しそうですっ！
records.en_novel: Waaah~~~! It all looks so delicious!
records.en_asset: Waaah~~~! It all looks so delicious!
records.vi: Waa~~~! Trông ngon quá đi mất!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
ふふん、そうでしょそうでしょ～♪　ベリサちゃんの魔法なら、
火加減もバッチリなんだから♪　さあ、遠慮せずに食べていいからね～♪
records.en_novel:
Hehe, I know right~♪ With Verisa-chan's magic, the heat control is
perfect♪ Now go ahead and eat as much as you want~♪
records.en_asset:
Hehe，I know right~♪ With Verisa-chan's magic， the heat control is
perfect♪ Now go ahead and eat as much as you want~♪
records.vi:
Hừ hừ‚ đúng chứ đúng chứ~♪ Phép thuật của Verisa-chan thì
canh lửa cũng chuẩn không cần chỉnh♪ Nào‚ cứ ăn thoải mái đi nhé~♪

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
はいっ、いただきます！
モグモグ、ムグムグ、もきゅもきゅ――
records.en_novel:
Yes, thank you for the food!
Nom nom, munch munch, chomp chomp——
records.en_asset:
Yes，thank you for the food!
Nom nom，munch munch，chomp chomp——
records.vi:
Vâng‚ em xin phép ăn ạ!
Măm măm‚ nhồm nhoàm‚ chóp chép――

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp: 食費が……っ！　今月分の食費がぁ～～～……！
records.en_novel: The food budget...! This month's food budget~~~...!
records.en_asset: The food budget...! This month's food budget~~~...!
records.vi: Tiền ăn…! Tiền ăn của tháng này~~~…!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
まだ足りません！　お腹がぐ～ぐ～鳴ってます～！
そーれそれそれ！　食材は全部カットカットカットです～！
records.en_novel:
Still not enough! My stomach is rumbling and rumbling~!
Here we go! Cut cut cut all the ingredients~!
records.en_asset:
Still not enough! My stomach is rumbling and rumbling~!
Here we go! Cut cut cut all the ingredients~!
records.vi:
Vẫn chưa đủ! Bụng em còn réo ùng ục đây~!
Nào nào nào! Tất cả nguyên liệu đều cắt cắt cắt hết~!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
ちょっ！　す、すごい量が来てる～！
これ全部焼くのぉ～！？
records.en_novel:
H-hey! A-an insane amount is coming in~!
I have to cook all of this~!?
records.en_asset:
H-hey! A-an insane amount is coming in~!
I have to cook all of this~!?
records.vi:
Khoan! M-một lượng khổng lồ đang tới kìa~!
Phải nướng hết chỗ này sao~!?

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
負けないでお姉ちゃん！　食材と戦って！
ウェンディさんの空腹を満たすために、お姉ちゃんの魔法が必要なの！
records.en_novel:
Don't give in, Onee-chan! Fight the ingredients!
We need your magic to satisfy Wendy-san's hunger!
records.en_asset:
Don't give in，Onee-chan! Fight the ingredients!
We need your magic to satisfy Wendy-san's hunger!
records.vi:
Đừng thua chị ơi! Hãy chiến đấu với nguyên liệu!
Để lấp đầy cơn đói của Wendy-san‚ chúng ta cần phép thuật của chị!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp:
そうね……そうだわ！
ベリサちゃんの魔法がウェンディのお腹を救うんだからぁ～！
records.en_novel:
That's right... you're right!
Verisa-chan's magic is going to save Wendy's tummy~!
records.en_asset:
That's right... you're right!
Verisa-chan's magic is going to save Wendy's tummy~!
records.vi:
Đúng rồi… đúng vậy!
Phép thuật của Verisa-chan sẽ cứu chiếc bụng của Wendy mà~!

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
いっくぞぉぉぉっ！
み～んなざこざこ、こんがり焼けちゃえ～～～っ！！！
records.en_novel:
Here I gooooo!
You're all helpless little weaklings, get roasted to a crisp~~~!!!
records.en_asset:
Here I gooooo!
You're all helpless little weaklings，get roasted to a crisp~~~!!!
records.vi:
Lên nàoooo!
Cả lũ yếu xìu các ngươi‚ bị nướng vàng thơm hết đi~~~!!!

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
ああぁっ！？
ワインに合わせて奮発して買った高級肉がぁぁ……！？
records.en_novel:
Ahhh!?
The premium meat I splurged on to pair with wine...!?
records.en_asset:
Ahhh!?
The premium meat I splurged on to pair with wine...!?
records.vi:
Aaa!?
Miếng thịt cao cấp mình mạnh tay mua để dùng cùng rượu vang…!?

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
ぜひゅー、ぜひゅー……！
な、なんとか、全部の症状がおさまったぁ……！
records.en_novel:
Huff, huff...!
S-somehow, all the symptoms have finally settled down...!
records.en_asset:
Huff，huff...!
S-somehow，all the symptoms have finally settled down...!
records.vi:
Hộc‚ hộc…!
C-cuối cùng thì mọi triệu chứng cũng lắng xuống rồi…!

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp: 皆さん、ありがとうございましたぁ～～！
records.en_novel: Thank you so much, everyone~~!
records.en_asset: Thank you so much，everyone~~!
records.vi: Cảm ơn mọi người nhiều lắm~~!

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
い、いいんですよ、気にしなくて……はぁ、はぁ……。
友だちじゃ、ないですか……
records.en_novel:
I-it's fine, don't worry about it... hah, hah...
We're friends, after all...
records.en_asset:
I-it's fine，don't worry about it... hah，hah...
We're friends，after all...
records.vi:
K-không sao đâu‚ đừng bận tâm… hộc‚ hộc…
Chúng ta là bạn mà…

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
そ、そういうことぉ……。あたしが面倒見るって言ったんだから、
遠慮なんて……ぜはぁ……しちゃ、ダメなんだからねぇ……？
records.en_novel:
E-exactly... I said I'd look after you, so
don't you dare... hah... hold back on us, okay...?
records.en_asset:
E-exactly... I said I'd look after you，so
don't you dare... hah... hold back on us，okay...?
records.vi:
Đ-đúng vậy đó… Chị đã nói sẽ chăm sóc em rồi nên
đừng có… hộc… khách sáo với bọn chị đấy… nhé…?

records.speaker: ウェンディ
records.jp: ヴィーラさん、ベリサさん……！
records.en_novel: Viera-san, Verisa-san...!
records.en_asset: Viera-san，Verisa-san...!
records.vi: Viera-san‚ Verisa-san…!

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
ま、ともかく今日は安定したみたいでよかったよ。
できれば、明日も様子を見たいところなんだが、視察があってな。
records.en_novel:
At any rate, she's stable for today, so that's good. I'd like to keep
watch tomorrow too, but I have an inspection to attend.
records.en_asset:
At any rate，she's stable for today，so that's good. I'd like to keep
watch tomorrow too，but I have an inspection to attend.
records.vi:
Dù sao thì hôm nay cô ấy đã ổn định‚ vậy là tốt rồi.
Nếu có thể thì mai anh cũng muốn theo dõi tiếp nhưng anh phải đi thị sát.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp: 視察ってことは……おにーさん、留守にするのぉ？
records.en_novel: An inspection, so... you'll be away, Onii-san?
records.en_asset: An inspection，so... you'll be away，Onii-san?
records.vi: Thị sát tức là… anh sẽ vắng nhà sao?

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
ああ。ベリサ、ヴィーラ。
ふたりでウェンディを助けてやってくれ。
records.en_novel:
Yeah. Verisa, Viera.
I'm counting on you two to look after Wendy.
records.en_asset:
Yeah. Verisa，Viera.
I'm counting on you two to look after Wendy.
records.vi:
Ừ. Verisa‚ Viera.
Hai em hãy cùng giúp Wendy nhé.

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp: <size=30>……チャンスね、ヴィーラ。</>
records.en_novel: <size=30>...This is our chance, Viera.</>
records.en_asset: <size=30>...This is our chance，Viera.</>
records.vi: <size=30>…Cơ hội đấy Viera.</>

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp: <size=30>……チャンスだね、お姉ちゃん。</>
records.en_novel: <size=30>...It sure is, Onee-chan.</>
records.en_asset: <size=30>...It sure is，Onee-chan.</>
records.vi: <size=30>…Đúng là cơ hội đó chị.</>

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp: ん？　何か言ったか？
records.en_novel: Hm? Did you say something?
records.en_asset: Hm? Did you say something?
records.vi: Hửm? Hai em vừa nói gì à?

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
なんでもな～い♪
こっちは大丈夫だから、おにーさんはさっさと視察に行っちゃえばぁ～？
records.en_novel:
Nothing at all~♪ We've got things covered here, so go on and head
off to your inspection~?
records.en_asset:
Nothing at all~♪ We've got things covered here，so go on and head
off to your inspection~?
records.vi:
Không có gì đâu~♪ Bên này ổn cả nên
anh cứ nhanh đi thị sát đi~?

records.speaker: <user>
records.jp:
そうか？　それじゃあ準備もあるから、俺はもう行くからな。
あとは任せたぞ――
records.en_novel:
That so? Then I've got prep to do, so I'll get going.
I'm leaving the rest to you——
records.en_asset:
That so? Then I've got prep to do，so I'll get going.
I'm leaving the rest to you——
records.vi:
Vậy à? Thế thì anh còn phải chuẩn bị nên đi đây.
Phần còn lại giao cho các em――

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
――さて、おにーさんも行ったことだしぃ、
あたしたちも明日に備えるとするかぁ～。
records.en_novel:
——Alright, now that Onii-san's gone,
let's get ready for tomorrow~.
records.en_asset:
——Alright，now that Onii-san's gone，
let's get ready for tomorrow~.
records.vi:
――Nào‚ anh cũng đi rồi
chúng ta cũng chuẩn bị cho ngày mai thôi nhỉ~.

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp:
そうですね。ウェンディさん、また明日。
……ウェンディさん？
records.en_novel:
Right. See you tomorrow, Wendy-san.
...Wendy-san?
records.en_asset:
Right. See you tomorrow，Wendy-san.
...Wendy-san?
records.vi:
Vâng. Wendy-san‚ hẹn gặp lại ngày mai.
…Wendy-san?

records.speaker: ヴィーラ
records.jp: ウェンディさん！？
records.en_novel: Wendy-san!?
records.en_asset: Wendy-san!?
records.vi: Wendy-san!?

records.speaker: ベリサ
records.jp:
ちょっと！？　どうしたってのよ！？
ウェンディ！　ウェンディ……！？
records.en_novel:
Hey!? What's wrong!?
Wendy! Wendy...!?
records.en_asset:
Hey!? What's wrong!?
Wendy! Wendy...!?
records.vi:
Này!? Chuyện gì vậy!?
Wendy! Wendy…!?
